sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6634" key="a)naisxuntogra/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναισχυντο-γράφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n6634.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">obscene writer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1733.tlg001:141" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">141</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
